# hrobot_traffic (Data Source)

Query traffic statistics for an IP address over a time range.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Daily traffic for an IP across a date range.
data "hrobot_traffic" "example" {
  type = "day"
  from = "2026-07-01T00"
  to   = "2026-07-07T23"
  ip   = "203.0.113.10"
}

output "traffic" {
  value = data.hrobot_traffic.example.data
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `from` (String) Start of the range (e.g. 2026-07-01T00 for day, 2026-07 for month, 2026 for year).
- `ip` (String) IP address to report traffic for.
- `to` (String) End of the range, same format as `from`.
- `type` (String) Aggregation granularity: day, month, or year.

### Read-Only

- `data` (Attributes Map) Traffic totals keyed by IP address; values are in/out/sum in the API's reported unit. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--data))

<a id="nestedatt--data"></a>
### Nested Schema for `data`

Read-Only:

- `in` (Number) Inbound traffic.
- `out` (Number) Outbound traffic.
- `sum` (Number) Total traffic.
